name: Chicken Broccoli Vegetable Saute
recipeIngredient: 1 cup broccoli cut into bite-sized pieces
10 1/4 ounces Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium heat, cook chicken in 1 tablespoon hot margarine for 10 minutes or until browned on both sides. Remove the chicken and keep warm.
2. In the same skillet, using the remaining margarine, cook broccoli, carrots, and mushrooms for 5 minutes, stirring often. Stir in the soup, milk, and pepper.
3. Heat to boiling.
4. Return the chicken to the skillet. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender. Garnish with lemon slices.
5. Makes 4 servings.
